use_cases: Form submission triggers and action buttons
Interactive UI controls with multiple visual variants
Accessible button component with focus management
Composable button using Radix UI Slot pattern
ai_summary: A reusable button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, offering multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Supports composition via asChild prop and includes built-in accessibility features with focus-visible outlines and disabled states. Designed for mixed platform use with subtle shadow effects.
